_meta.description: Citation-tagged reference values for validating the Barkley (2011) pipe-flow reproduction. Analytic values are derived from the model; external values carry verified citations.

r_c.description: Critical Reynolds-number proxy separating excitable (equilibrium puff) from bistable (expanding slug) regimes.
r_c.verification_note: r_c = eps2/(eps1+eps2) = 0.2/0.24 = 5/6, recomputed via nullclines.critical_r(); exact rational value.

citation.title: Simplifying the complexity of pipe flow
citation.note: Primary source: defines the reduced model reproduced here.

turbulent_node_q_r1.description: q-coordinate of the bistable turbulent fixed point at r = 1.0.
turbulent_node_q_r1.verification_note: Largest-q real root of the nullcline cubic via nullclines.fixed_points(1.0); ~1.343, README quotes 1.34.

citation.title: Simplifying the complexity of pipe flow
citation.note: Primary source: defines the reduced model reproduced here.

turbulent_node_u_r1.description: u-coordinate of the bistable turbulent fixed point at r = 1.0.
turbulent_node_u_r1.verification_note: u = eps1/(eps1+eps2 q) at the turbulent root; ~0.130, README quotes 0.13.

citation.title: Simplifying the complexity of pipe flow
citation.note: Primary source: defines the reduced model reproduced here.

laminar_eig_1.description: First Jacobian eigenvalue at the laminar point (0, 1).
laminar_eig_1.verification_note: Eigenvalue -delta = -0.1; laminar point stable for all r.

citation.title: Simplifying the complexity of pipe flow
citation.note: Primary source: defines the reduced model reproduced here.

laminar_eig_2.description: Second Jacobian eigenvalue at the laminar point (0, 1).

citation.title: Simplifying the complexity of pipe flow
citation.note: Primary source: defines the reduced model reproduced here.

Re_crossover_avila2011.description: Experimental/DNS Reynolds number at which the puff decay and splitting timescales cross -- the onset of sustained turbulence in pipe flow.
Re_crossover_avila2011.verification_note: Citation (Science 333:192-196, DOI 10.1126/science.1203223, PMID 21737736) confirmed against PubMed and ISTA; abstract confirms a 'distinct critical point'. The numeric 2040 +/- 10 is in the paywalled body/figures, so this is citation_verified, not primary_verified; corroborated by Avila, Barkley & Hof (2023) review.

citation.authors: Avila, K., Moxey, D., de Lozar, A., Avila, M., Barkley, D., Hof, B.
citation.title: The onset of turbulence in pipe flow

beta_DP.description: Order-parameter critical exponent of the (1+1)D directed-percolation universality class (the class of the sustained-turbulence onset).
beta_DP.verification_note: beta_DP = 0.276486(8); confirmed against the DP literature (Jensen 1999; arXiv:cond-mat/0205490). Barkley's quoted 0.28 is this value rounded.

citation.title: Low-density series expansions for directed percolation I: a new efficient algorithm with applications to the square lattice

R_x_reproduced.description: This project's measured decay/splitting lifetime crossing from the discrete model (reduced, Colab-sized ensembles).
R_x_reproduced.verification_note: Reproduction output, NOT a reference. Validated by comparison against Re_crossover_avila2011 (2040 +/- 10): 2038 is inside the band.

R_c_onset_reproduced.description: This project's measured sustained-turbulence onset (turbulent fraction departs from zero) in the discrete model.
R_c_onset_reproduced.verification_note: Reproduction output, NOT a reference. NOTE: the onset R_c is a DIFFERENT quantity from the crossover R_x; do not force it into the 2040 +/- 10 band. Compare like with like.
